title: What's SOTA for AI Voice Narration
abstract:
I need some character voice acting for an animation I'm making. The response from people when I used Elevenlabs was that it felt flat and characters were inconsistent.

I was previously using the voice reference on seedance 2.0, but obviously that's limited to 15 seconds, and I have 40 li
abstract_zh: 我得给我的动画配个声优，用 ElevenLabs 的时候，感觉就像机器人念剧本，角色性格也不对味。之前用 Seedance 2.0 还好，最多就 15 秒，可我现在得录 40 多秒呢！这下子，我要找的是 SOTA（当今最先进水平）的 AI 声音演绎，别再让我听机器人的念白了！
